steps.title: Use the tablet evidence
steps.content: The tablet suggests Merneith was in charge of Egypt’s treasury and other central offices. Those are major government responsibilities.

steps.title: Infer her role
steps.content: Choice B conflicts with the First Dynasty context. Choice C and Choice D introduce travel and writing-system claims that the text never supports. Being in charge of the treasury and central offices supports the idea that Merneith had an important governmental role. The answer is A.
